description: Verso: Accounts. Dated in the heading in the month of Tammuz with an alphanumerical year that is somewhat unclear. Based on the paleography the document is likely late medieval or early modern, 14th-16th centuries. Requires further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
